query: Who taught the robot how to wave hello?

expected_answer.summary: Alice taught the robot how to wave hello.
details: Alice instructed the robot on how to wave hello

query: How should the robot wave hello?

expected_answer.summary: The robot should wave hello using a friendly gesture.
details: Raise the right arm to shoulder height
Wave the hand left and right a few times
Smile while waving to appear friendly

query: What personal preferences has Bob shared with the robot?

expected_answer.summary: Bob shared his drink preferences and a reminder request.
details: Bob wants the robot to remind him to drink water in the afternoon

query: Who asked the robot to greet guests politely and maintain eye contact?

expected_answer.summary: Charlie asked the robot to greet guests politely and maintain eye contact.
details: Maintain eye contact when saying hello
Prefers coffee without milk or sugar
